hooks.command: read -r stdin; fp=$(echo "$stdin" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$fp" | grep -qE 'src/.*\.(tsx|ts|css)$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"UI RULE CHECK: Before editing this file, load every relevant file from UI_rules/ per the CLAUDE.md routing table. Any UI task: Typography.md always. Color/surfaces/borders: Color_guidelines.md + color.tokens.json. Icons: Icons.md. Shadows/elevation: Elevation.md. Buttons/inputs/chips: all four files. Charts/dataviz: Data_visualization.md + Color_guidelines.md + color.tokens.json. This step is mandatory — do it before writing the first line of code."}}' || true
